tracks.rawText: 5:06In the Quiet I Knew (Luxury Edition) [BWVYx_qmaHQ]UploadCinematic pop ballad featuring a dramatic, orchestral arrangement, The track opens with a filtered, atmospheric synth pad and a processed vocal sample, A clean, arpeggiated electric guitar enters, followed by a deep, sub-heavy synth bass and a steady mid-tempo electronic drum beat with a crisp snare, The arrangement builds with staccato string ostinatos and soaring legato violins, A powerful male tenor vocal delivers the melody with heavy reverb and delay, The chorus features layered vocal harmonies and crashing orchestral percussion, The bridge transitions into a stripped-back section with solo piano and sustained string pads before a final climactic chorus, The track is in the key of B minor at 120 BPM5PublishRemix
tracks.title: In the Quiet I Knew (Luxury Edition) [BWVYx_qmaHQ]

tracks.rawText: 1:46Flor Hipnóticav5.5Core sound: Genre-fluid sonic architecture blending reggae-dub, techno, electronic, and global rhythms, Built around groove, emotional impact, and cinematic atmosphere, designed for both dancefloor energy and deep listening experiences, Lyrics & mood: Hybrid storytelling that moves between introspection, sensuality, ambition, and transcendence, Hooks are immediate and memorable, often chant-driven, with a balance between poetic depth and viral simplicity, Production palette: Deep sub-bass, textured percussion, offbeat grooves, evolving synthscapes, and spatial FX (delay, reverb, modulation), Frequent use of contrast: minimal vs explosive, silence vs impact, analog warmth vs futuristic digital textures, Language & vocals: Bilingual flow (English/Spanish) with global accessibility, Vocals range from melodic, hypnotic singing to rhythmic, charismatic delivery, Focus on identity, tone, and presence over perfection, Artistic direction: Not bound to genres — each track is a world, Design1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Flor Hipnótica
